mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, directly boosting equity valuations over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate rises above 4.5 percent, labor market deterioration triggers recession fears that compress equity multiples, yielding negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in industrial production and housing starts signal a synchronized contraction in real economic activity, forcing equity risk premiums higher and depressing forward market returns.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict negative returns with statistical significance (p > 0.05) across three consecutive out-of-sample years.

mechanism_narrative: Rising real consumer credit balances indicate accelerating household leverage, which historically fuels equity rallies during early-cycle recoveries but reverses sharply when inflation accelerates.
failure_condition: Forward returns turn negative when RSAFS rises alongside CPIAUCSL increases exceeding 0.3 percent month-over-month for two consecutive months.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production falling below its 12-month moving average signals supply-side bottlenecks resolving into actual output weakness, which reduces corporate profit expectations and drives equity prices lower over the next month.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO drops below its 12-month moving average
failure_condition: The signal produces a positive predictive rank correlation over any 5-year rolling window, or forward returns do not differ significantly from the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: Rapid payroll growth combined with stagnant housing permits indicates an overheating economy where labor demand outpaces physical capacity, leading to margin compression and negative equity returns over the subsequent week.
failure_condition: The interaction term loses statistical significance in a multivariate regression controlling for FEDFUNDS, or forward returns are not significantly negative during the specified regime.

mechanism_narrative: Sequential quarterly growth in real GDP expands the earnings base for S&P 500 constituents, generating positive forward market returns over the following month as valuation multiples stabilize.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in expansion quarters are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate exceeds 3.0 percent while core inflation remains sticky above 2.5 percent, restrictive policy fails to cool prices, triggering stagflation fears that compress equity valuations over the next quarter.
regime_hint: monetary tightening cycle with sticky inflation
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.
